evals.name: modern-editorial-wellness
evals.prompt: I'm rebranding a wellness brand. Founder is a 40-something nutritionist, the brand sits between premium and approachable, not clinical. They want something modern editorial — feels considered, not cold. Need a display serif and a paired sans for body. Three options each, please.

evals.name: alternative-to-soehne
evals.prompt: I love Söhne but this client's budget can't stretch to Klim. What's a good free or cheaper alternative I can use across web and print, ideally with a similar feel — that 1950s Akzidenz lineage but with modern proportions?

evals.name: tech-startup-pairing
evals.prompt: B2B SaaS startup, Series A, AI-adjacent infra product. CEO wants 'modern, technical, trustworthy, not boring'. Need display, text, and mono. Lean toward something with a bit of personality but readable at body sizes.
